data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Character limits with auto-splitting', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions character limits, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that these limits are enforced or that auto-splitting occurs when messages exceed the specified length. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of character limits being enforced or auto-splitting functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add tests for character limits and auto-splitting
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that messages exceeding character limits are split correctly.
